events.name: breakthrough
events.description: Coding breakthrough: automated drone maintenance saves labor.

events.name: ice_volcano
events.description: Cryovolcanic eruption 200km north — ground tremors felt.

subsim_log.expression: (let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))
(let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))

governance.rationale: Elect a council of 3 for 5 years.

meta_awareness.insight: Ora Flame asks: 'If I am a LisPy data structure, can I rewrite myself?'

narrative:
## Year 33

### Events
- [GRN] **breakthrough**: Coding breakthrough: automated drone maintenance saves labor.
- [YEL] **ice_volcano**: Cryovolcanic eruption 200km north — ground tremors felt.

**Activity:** explore(4), mediate(3), terraform(2), sabotage(1), farm(1)
**Resources:** food:100%[OK] | water:100%[OK] | power:100%[OK] | air:100%[OK] | medicine:100%[OK]
**Cohesion:** 70%

### Sub-simulations (8)
- depth-1 fen-marsh: 1.1
- depth-2 fen-marsh: 1.2100000000000002
- depth-1 aura-kai: 1

### Governance: council [PASSED]
Vote: 10 for / 4 against

*META: Ora Flame asks: 'If I am a LisPy data structure, can I rewrite myself?'*

diaries.text:
**Dax Iron** (fire/soldier) — Year 33

Another year. We are still here.

We did something impossible today.

*— Dax Iron, soldier*

**Pax Stone** (earth/judge) — Year 33

The earth in me stirs with possibility.

We did something impossible today.

*— Pax Stone, judge*

**Aura Kai** (air/philosopher) — Year 33

Another year. We are still here.

We did something impossible today.

*— Aura Kai, philosopher*
